limitations: This is a deterministic prototype harness. Real relay sockets, LMDB/SQLite writes, UniFFI marshaling, platform wrappers, and NSE calls are modeled because those runtime pieces do not exist yet.
Replay mode is CI-shaped and deterministic. Capture mode currently writes a synthetic trace manifest, not live WebSocket frames.
Live mode is intentionally not implemented until the actor, relay adapter, and storage backend exist.
observations: Live mode is blocked on real relay adapter, storage backend, and actor integration.
